content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event Type & Context**: This is a PR comment where @cmungall requested a review of PR #613 after main has been merged in. The PR title is "Update cached term data and fix YAML formatting" and involves ontology term cache updates and YAML formatting fixes.

b. **Request Type**: This is explicitly a code review request ("@claude review this PR"). The user mentions that main has been merged in and previous issues may be resolved, suggesting there were prior review concerns.

c. **Key Information**:
   - PR is still open, on branch `claude/update-go-term-phosphatase-9HOW8`
   - Previous review by Claude found issues: spliced snippet (PMID:41675685) and wrong evidence_source (PMID:17143285)
   - PR involves cache updates, YAML formatting fixes, and Noonan Syndrome knowledge base updates
   - No files shown as changed in current diff (likely due to merge)

d. **Main Tasks**:
   - Review the current state of the PR after main merge
   - Check if the previously identified issues have been resolved
   - Verify evidence snippets are exact quotes
   - Validate evidence_source classifications
   - Check ontology term correctness
   - Provide comprehensive review feedback

e. **Plan of Action**:
   - Read the current state of key files (especially Noonan_Syndrome.yaml)
   - Check if the spliced snippet issue was fixed
   - Verify the evidence_source classification issue was addressed
   - Review any new changes since the merge
   - Provide updated review status via GitHub comment

f. **Limitations**: I can provide thorough review feedback but cannot submit formal GitHub PR reviews or approve the PR. I'll provide detailed feedback via comment update.
</analysis>

input.body: Claude Code is working on your review… ### Review Progress - [ ] Read current state of Noonan_Syndrome.yaml - [ ] Check if spliced snippet issue (PMID:41675685) was fixed - [ ] Check if evidence_source issue (PMID:17143285) was fixed - [ ] Review any other changes since main merge - [ ] Provide comprehensive review feedback --- [View job run](https://github.com/monarch-initiative/dismech/actions/runs/23331763315)
